name: PAX FLOW Oven Screens
summary: Keep your PAX Flow Vaporiser running at peak performance with the official PAX Flow Replacement Oven Screens.
description: Keep your PAX Flow Vaporiser running at peak performance with the official PAX Flow Replacement Oven Screens. Designed with a precision-curved shape, these stainless steel screens optimise airflow, support even heat distribution, and help deliver smooth, consistent vapour with every draw. Authentic OEM part – sourced directly from PAX Labs for guaranteed compatibility. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
